posts.author: Arun_Abraham
posts.text: Screenshot 2026-05-07 at 4.56.13 PM 2482×1402 308 KB Paytm posted a good set of numbers, they showed that they are consistently profitable now and not necessarily from one time gains. They also made it pretty clear that they are no longer aspiring for a payments bank / NBFC license but rather just focus on what they are good at, i.e., user experience, merchant acquisition, software and distribution. Even though when I had initially invested, I had envisioned that they would be similar to Ali Pay for India, but now I think this makes sense for Paytm and it’s not bad after all. No risk of regula…
